content: agent2: implementing env var + ~ expansion in FileSystemLoader.__init__ (src/jinja2/loaders.py). Will only touch that method's searchpath handling. Let me know if you're touching loaders.py too.

ack — my change is only in FileSystemLoader.__init__: self.searchpath = [os.path.expanduser(os.path.expandvars(os.fspath(p))) for p in searchpath], plus docstring/CHANGES note. No other methods touched. Should merge cleanly with your path_transform addition.
